prompt: Cinematic wide interior photograph of a luxury cafe-orangery beneath a vast curved glass dome in a botanical park. Airy space filled with lush tropical greenery and cascading pink and white orchids, elegant minimalist dining tables with cream linen, warm brushed-gold accents, natural morning daylight streaming through the glass ceiling, soft mist of calm. Palette of ivory, cream, deep forest green and antique gold. Serene, mindful, high-end editorial architectural photography, shallow depth of field, no people, no text, no signage, no watermark.

Elegant minimal abstract background for a luxury brand. Soft watercolor tropical palm leaves and delicate orchid silhouettes in pale beige and ivory, faint tone-on-tone, with a few fine flowing antique-gold line accents in the corners. Vast empty negative space in the center. Warm cream ivory base color. Refined, calm, sophisticated, no text, no words, no watermark, flat, no photographic subject.

Elegant minimal abstract background for a luxury brand. Very soft watercolor botanical leaves clustered in the lower-left and upper-right corners, pale sand and champagne tones on a warm ivory cream base, subtle thin gold hairline curves. Large clean empty center area. Airy, understated, premium editorial, no text, no words, no watermark, flat.

Luxury dark background. Deep forest green (#2B3D22) base with subtly darker tone-on-tone tropical monstera and palm leaf shadows, and a few refined thin antique-gold orchid line-art accents drifting in from the corners. Rich, moody, elegant, generous empty center space. Editorial, sophisticated, no text, no words, no watermark, flat.

Luxury dark background. Deep forest green velvet base with faint darker botanical leaf silhouettes and delicate brushed-gold hairline curves sweeping across the corners. Calm, opulent, lots of clean negative space in the middle. Refined high-end editorial, no text, no words, no watermark, flat.

Vertical editorial interior photograph inside a luxury cafe-orangery under a curved glass dome. Lush hanging greenery and blooming pink orchids frame the scene, a sculptural indoor tree, soft natural daylight, elegant table with cream linen in soft focus. Palette ivory, cream, forest green, gold. Tranquil, breathing, biophilic, high-end restaurant, medium-format photography, shallow depth of field, no people, no text, no watermark.

Vertical macro photograph of a single elegant pink-and-white Phalaenopsis orchid bloom with soft dew, against a creamy softly blurred ivory background with hints of green foliage. Delicate, luminous, serene, natural soft light. Fine-art botanical editorial photography, shallow depth of field, no text, no watermark.

Overhead editorial photograph of a beautifully set fine-dining table at a luxury orangery cafe: cream linen, refined ceramic plates, polished glassware, brushed-gold cutlery neatly aligned, a tiny orchid stem and a folded linen napkin, sprigs of greenery. Warm natural daylight, soft shadows. Palette ivory, cream, green, gold. Elegant, calm, high-end, no people, no text, no watermark.

Vertical close-up editorial photograph of a waiter's hands gracefully pouring sparkling water from an elegant glass carafe into a crystal glass at a beautifully set restaurant table, greenery and orchids softly blurred behind. Warm natural light, refined and attentive mood. Palette cream, green, gold. Hands only, no faces, shallow depth of field, no text, no watermark.

Vertical editorial photograph of a waiter's hand presenting a beautifully plated gourmet dish with an open-hand gesture onto a cream-linen table, delicate plating with edible flowers and greenery, soft daylight, orchids blurred in background. Elegant, precise, warm hospitality. Palette ivory, green, gold. Hand and plate focus, no faces, shallow depth of field, no text, no watermark.

Vertical editorial photograph of an elegant plated dessert beside a glass cup of herbal tea on a cream-linen table, tiny orchid garnish, brushed-gold spoon, warm afternoon light, greenery softly blurred behind. Vertical editorial photograph of a waiter carrying a round serving tray elegantly on one hand, moving gracefully through a light-filled orangery dining room full of plants and orchids, motion calm and composed, seen from mid-distance and slightly behind.
